output:
Aggregated execute batches: completed 5/5.
Batch 1: Implemented T1 in `src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.ts` and checkpointed batch progress to `.megaplan/plans/design-a-robust-fix-for-stale-20260413-0518/execution_batch_1.json`. `resolveGroupTrackId()` now fast-paths when all group clips still live on the stored row, otherwise scans rows and returns the row with the highest clip match count, falling back to the stored `trackId` for orphaned groups. `findGroupForTrack()` now preserves `(shotId, trackId)` identity by accepting an exact stored-key match only when it still resolves to the requested track, then falling back to a resolved scan across same-shot groups. Verification passed on the targeted module test and on the full video editor suite before and after the change.
Batch 2: Batch 2 is complete. Added helper coverage in `src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.test.ts`, updated the stale-track display expectation in `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.test.ts`, and patched the remaining batch-owned hook sites in `useTimelineTrackManagement.ts`, `useSwitchToFinalVideo.ts`, and `useClipDrag.helpers.ts`. The current HEAD already contained the planned `shot-group-commands.ts`, `usePinnedShotGroups.ts`, and `useShotGroups.ts` logic, so those tasks were completed by verification rather than new diffs. Verification passed on the targeted affected modules and on the full video-editor suite: `51` test files and `309` tests passed. Best-effort checkpointing was written to `.megaplan/plans/design-a-robust-fix-for-stale-20260413-0518/execution_batch_2.json`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added `resolveGroupTrackId(group, rows)` and `findGroupForTrack(groups, shotId, trackId, rows)` in `src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.ts`. `resolveGroupTrackId` checks the stored row first, returns immediately when all group clips still live there, otherwise scans rows and returns the row with the most matching clipIds, falling back to the stored `trackId` when no live clips are found. `findGroupForTrack` now preserves composite `(shotId, trackId)` identity by only accepting an exact stored-key match if it still resolves to the requested track, then falling back to a resolved scan across same-shot groups. Verification: baseline `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/` passed before edits; post-change `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.test.ts` and `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/` both passed.

Expanded `src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.test.ts` to cover both helpers end-to-end: stored-track fast path, stale-track slow path, orphan fallback, split-row majority resolution, exact match, resolved stale lookup, no-match undefined, and multi-group same-shot behavior. Verification: `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/lib/shot-group-commands.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.softtag.test.tsx`; `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/`.

Verified `src/tools/video-editor/lib/shot-group-commands.ts` already resolves stale pinned groups through `findGroupForTrack` and `resolveGroupTrackId` at the planned lookup sites and self-heals the returned `pinnedShotGroupsOverride` entries with the corrected trackId. No additional diff was required in this batch because the current HEAD already contained the needed command-builder changes. Verification: `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/lib/shot-group-commands.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.softtag.test.tsx`; `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/`.

Verified `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/usePinnedShotGroups.ts` already separates `storedTrackId` from `resolvedTrackId` through the sync loop, uses resolved track ids for row and clip-order access, and self-heals the next pinned-group output when stored state is stale. No additional diff was required in this batch because the current HEAD already contained the planned sync-loop fix. Verification: `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/lib/shot-group-commands.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.softtag.test.tsx`; `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/`.

Confirmed `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.ts` already resolves stale `trackId` values for row lookup and emitted `rowId`, and updated the existing hook test to assert the stale-track rendering behavior explicitly. Verification: `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/lib/shot-group-commands.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.softtag.test.tsx`; `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/`.

Updated `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.ts` so grouped move callers resolve stale source tracks before row-kind checks, `translateGroupMembers` self-heals against the stored config group, and `moveSelectedClipsToTrack` now uses `findGroupForTrack` plus resolved track ids for group row lookup and application. Verification: `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/lib/shot-group-commands.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.softtag.test.tsx`; `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/`.

Updated `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useSwitchToFinalVideo.ts` so rollback and latest-video lookup sites use `findGroupForTrack`, resolve live track ids from `TimelineData.rows`, and preserve self-healed `trackId` values in rollback mutations. Verification: `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/lib/shot-group-commands.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.softtag.test.tsx`; `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/`.

Updated `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.helpers.ts` so `buildPendingDragSession` stores `originTrackId` from `resolveGroupTrackId(enclosingGroup.group, current.rows)` instead of stale stored state. Verification: `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/lib/shot-group-commands.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.softtag.test.tsx`; `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/`.

Expanded `src/tools/video-editor/lib/shot-group-commands.test.ts` with stale-`trackId` fixtures for image and video groups whose stored `trackId` is `V1` while their clips actually live on `V2`. Added regression coverage for pin, unpin, update, delete, switch-to-final-video, update-to-latest-video, and switch-to-images paths. The tests verify both that each builder still operates when called with the resolved track id and, for builders that return the group in `pinnedShotGroupsOverride`, that the emitted `trackId` is corrected to `V2`. Verification: baseline `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/` passed before edits; post-change `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/lib/shot-group-commands.test.ts` and `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/` both passed.

Executed all required verification commands without modifying application code. The targeted helper, command, drag, display, track-management, and drag-session Vitest modules all passed; the full `src/tools/video-editor/` suite also passed cleanly with 51 files and 316 tests passing; and `npx tsc --noEmit` completed with zero errors. The full-suite run emitted expected warning/log noise from existing intentionally-throwing and repair-logging tests, but there were no failing tests and nothing was skipped.

Ran the final regression verification against the current tree without changing application code. A one-off repro script recreated the stale `pinnedShotGroup.trackId` scenario, confirmed lookup by resolved track still succeeds, and confirmed the returned mutation self-heals the group to `V2`; the script was then deleted. After that, the full changed-module Vitest command passed with 6 files and 62 tests, the full `src/tools/video-editor/` suite passed again with 51 files and 316 tests, and `npx tsc --noEmit` completed with zero errors. No regressions were found, so no fixes were required in this batch.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `findGroupForTrack()` still keys by `(shotId, trackId)`: it only returns an exact stored-key match if `resolveGroupTrackId()` confirms that group actually resolves to the requested track, otherwise it falls back to scanning same-shot groups by resolved track. In the multi-track-per-shot case, `findGroupForTrack(groups, 'shot-1', 'V1', rows)` therefore returns the group whose clips actually live on `V1`, even when that group's stored `trackId` is stale.
Yes. `src/tools/video-editor/lib/pinned-group-projection.test.ts` now includes a split-row case with 2 clips on `V1` and 3 clips on `V2`, and asserts that `resolveGroupTrackId()` returns `V2`.

Yes. In `src/tools/video-editor/lib/shot-group-commands.ts`, stale-group lookups feed the resolved track id back into the returned override builders, so the output arrays self-heal the stored `trackId` instead of only correcting a local variable.

Yes. In `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/usePinnedShotGroups.ts`, the sync loop uses `resolvedTrackId` for row lookup, clip-order access, `appendActionToTrack`, and `buildAssetDropEdit`, while identity matching and empty-group filtering still key off `storedTrackId`; the mapped next-group candidate also spreads `trackId: resolvedTrackId` when stale.

Yes. `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.ts` resolves the live track first and uses that resolved value both for the row lookup and for the emitted `ShotGroup.rowId`, so downstream overlay consumers see the correct row.

Yes. `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.ts` now uses `findGroupForTrack` for both grouped selection lookup sites, derives row indices from `resolveGroupTrackId`, and `moveClipToRow` passes a group with resolved `trackId` into `translateGroupMembers`.

Yes. `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useSwitchToFinalVideo.ts` now uses `findGroupForTrack` in the restore helper and latest-video callback, and both lookup paths pass the available `rows` from `currentData` or `dataRef.current` into the helper.
Yes. `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.helpers.ts` now calls `resolveGroupTrackId(enclosingGroup.group, current.rows)` and stores that resolved value as `originTrackId` in the drag session.

Yes. The new stale-track test cases verify both sides of the requirement: they prove the builders still find and operate on a group whose stored `trackId` is stale, and the update/switch mutation cases assert that the returned `pinnedShotGroupsOverride` entries self-heal from `V1` to `V2` in the emitted output.

Yes. All requested existing video-editor test modules passed without requiring any code changes in this batch, the full `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/` pass completed with 51 files and 316 tests passing, and `npx tsc --noEmit` completed with zero errors. The only extra output was expected warning/log noise from existing tests; no failures were skipped or left unresolved.

Yes. The final verification tests passed: the stale-trackId repro script succeeded, the relevant changed-module Vitest run passed, the full `src/tools/video-editor/` suite passed again with 51 files and 316 tests, and `npx tsc --noEmit` passed. No regressions were found, so nothing needed to be fixed in this final batch.
